verses.text: Judah kumpipa Jehoiakim kumpi a suahzawh a kum thumna kumin, Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzar in Jerusalem khuapi simin a umcih hi
Topa in kumpi Jehoiakim leh biakinnpi na manphate kumpi Nebukhadnezzar a mansak hi. Amah in a mi matte Babylon gam ama pasian biakinn-ah paipih a, na manpha a matte sumkoihna inn-ah a koih hi
Kumpipa in Israel salte sunga kumpi nam leh milian namte lak pan mi pawlkhat a teelkhia dingin innsungmang lian pen Ashpenaz thu a pia hi

Tua mite, kumpi innsunga nasem siamte a suahtheihna dingun a melhoih, pumpi tung poina a neilo, a navak, hoihtakin pilna a kisinsak, na a thei baih, a lungsim navak ngentang ding ahi hi. Ashpenaz in amaute Babylon lai leh a pau a hilh ding ahi hi

Amaute pen kumpi innsunga nasem dangte mah bangin nisimin an leh leenggahzu tawh a vak dingin kumpipa in thu a pia hi. Tua bangin kum thum sung sinna a neih khit uh ciangin kumpipa mai-ah amaute a kilak kik ding uh ahi hi
Tua bangin a kiteelte, Judah mite vive hi a, Daniel, Hananiah, Mishael, leh Azariah-te ahi uh hi
Innsungmang lianpenpa in amaute min thak phuah a, Daniel' min dingin Belteshazzar, Hananiah' min dingin Shadrak, Mishael' min dingin Meshak, Azariah' min dingin Abednego a phuak hi
Daniel in kumpi innsunga an leh leenggahzu tawh a pumpi a thanghuaisak lohna dingin a lungsim a khensat hi. Amah in innsungmang lianpen Ashpenaz kiangah tua bang an a kipiaklohna dingin a ngen zaw hi
Tua ciangin Pasian in Daniel tungah Ashpenaz in ngaihsut siamna a neih theihna dingin a bawlsak hi

Ahih hangin Ashpenaz in Daniel kiangah, “Kumpipa in na annek ding uh leh na dawn ding uh sehsa-in nei khinzo ahih ciangin, khangno dangte banzo kei kha zenzen leteh a hong thah ding ka lau hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Daniel zong Ashpenaz in amah leh adang thumte a cing dingin a koihpa kiangah a pai hi
Amah in, “Ni sawm sung hong ze-etin, anteh bek hong nesak in la, tui bek hong dawnsak in
Tua ciangin kumpipa' an a ne khangnote tawh hong enkak khawm in la, nong muhna bangbangin thu khenta in,” a ci hi
Amah in amau' ngetna bang mangin ni sawm sung ze-et dingin a thukim hi
Ni sawm a cin' khit ciangin amaute pen kumpi an nete sangin cidamzaw uh a, a ci a sa uh a hoihzaw hi
Tua ciangin a cingpa in kumpi an leh leenggahzu pialoin amaute anteh an a pia hi
Pasian in tua khangno lite laitheih siamna leh pilna thukte a pia hi. Daniel pen maangmuhna leh mangkhiat siamna a pia hi
Kumpipa' sehsa kum thum a cin' khit ciangin Ashpenaz in khangnote khempeuh kumpipa kiangah a paipih hi
Kumpipa in amaute khempeuh hopih a, Daniel, Hananiah, Mishael, leh Azariah-te adangteng khempeuh sangin a hoihzawk tuanlam uh a mu hi. Tua ahih ciangin kumpi inn-a vaihawm ulian pawl a suak uh hi
Kumpipa in bangbang thuhaksa nono a dot hangin, hih mi lite pen ama gamsung khempeuha mitphial siamte leh aisan theite khempeuh sangin a zah sawmin a siamzawklam uh a mu hi
Sairas, Babylon kumpi a suah hun dong, kumpi inn-ah Daniel omto paisuak hi.
